name: relay
description: this is an fully functional chat application
author: the GOAT rudra sanandiya

scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.version:patch: npm version patch && cd backend && npm version patch && cd ../frontend && npm version patch && cd .. && git add . && git commit -m "chore: bump version to $(node -p "require('./package.json').version")" && git tag v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor && cd backend && npm version minor && cd ../frontend && npm version minor && cd .. && git add . && git commit -m "chore: bump version to $(node -p "require('./package.json').version")" && git tag v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")
scripts.version:major: npm version major && cd backend && npm version major && cd ../frontend && npm version major && cd .. && git add . && git commit -m "chore: bump version to $(node -p "require('./package.json').version")" && git tag v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")
